title: Retire the last two local full-suite mandates: session finish and the release gate
action: Per full-run-retirement D1. (1) AGENTS.block.md Session finish rule 3 + root AGENTS.md byte-parallel: 'If commands.test is recorded, run it (the impacted run over what this session changed): end green, or end red only with a fix-first cell filed and the red result reported — never left silent. The full suite stays CI-owned.' (2) routing-and-contracts.md ~:288: replace the 'session finish and release gates still invoke it directly, unchanged' clause — session finish runs commands.test; the release flow runs impacted locally and dispatches the CI full run (gh workflow run CI) right after pushing the tag; red arrives as a verify-red issue. (3) bee-executing SKILL.md ~:67 same clause updated identically in spirit. (4) scripts/bump_version.mjs printed release checklist: step 2 becomes the impacted run (node scripts/run_verify.mjs --impacted-from-git), and a new post-push step 'dispatch the CI full run: gh workflow run CI --ref main'; check scripts/test_bump_version.mjs for assertions on the printed text and update them (never weakened). Red-first: capture the current grep of 'full verify suite' in bump_version.mjs + the rule-3 commands.verify text before editing; both gone after. Then mirrors regen (onboard --apply + render_plugin), release_manifest --write, impact_registry --check (--write if drifted).

truths: zero surfaces mandate a local full run outside CI (grep-proof: rule 3 uses commands.test; bump checklist names impacted + gh workflow run)

verify: node scripts/test_bump_version.mjs && node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Retired the last two local full-suite mandates: session-finish rule 3 (both AGENTS twins) now runs commands.test/impacted, routing-and-contracts.md and bee-executing SKILL.md's 'unchanged' release clause replaced with impacted+CI-dispatch language, bump_version.mjs's printed checklist swapped 'full verify suite' for run_verify --impacted-from-git plus a new post-push gh workflow run CI step; mirrors/manifest/registry regenerated.

  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell, two surfaces still mandated a local full-suite run despite full-run-retirement's CI-owned intent: (1) AGENTS.md/AGENTS.block.md Session-finish rule 3 read literally 'If `commands.verify` is recorded, run it' (line 106/99) — commands.verify is the full chain, so session finish still invoked it locally; (2) scripts/bump_version.mjs's printed release checklist step 2 read 'Run the full verify suite (must be green).' (line 134) — the release flow's only instruction was a local full run with no CI dispatch step at all. Both grepped clean before edit (see red_first below) and are gone after (see green_after).",
